source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question:In the figure shown, self-impedances of the two transmission lines are \( 1.5j \, p.u \) each, and \( Z_m = 0.5j \, p.u \) is the mutual impedance. Bus voltages shown in the figure are in p.u. Given that \( \delta > 0 \), the maximum steady-state real power that can be transferred in p.u from Bus-1 to Bus-2 is

Choices:
A. \( |E| |V| \)  
B. \( \frac{|E| |V|}{2} \)  
C. \( 2 |E| |V| \)  
D. \( \frac{3 |E| |V|}{2} \)
